metadata.name: RetroHydra Scraper Test Library
metadata.license: Catalog metadata only. No ROMs, BIOS, firmware, or keys are distributed. Import your own legally obtained game files.

catalog.title: Super Mario Bros. 3
catalog.description: User-provided NES title used to exercise CRC32 hash matching against ScreenScraper.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Super Mario Bros. 3 .nes ROM.

catalog.title: Chrono Trigger
catalog.description: User-provided SNES title for hash and name matching plus SteamGridDB artwork enrichment.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Chrono Trigger .sfc/.smc ROM.

catalog.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
catalog.description: User-provided Nintendo 64 title for verifying name fallback and hero/logo artwork.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Ocarina of Time .z64/.n64 ROM.

catalog.title: Metroid Fusion
catalog.description: User-provided Game Boy Advance title for CRC32 hash matching.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Metroid Fusion .gba ROM.

catalog.title: Shadow of the Colossus
catalog.description: User-provided PlayStation 2 title. Compressed .chd images fall back to name matching.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Shadow of the Colossus .iso/.chd image.

catalog.title: God of War: Chains of Olympus
catalog.description: User-provided PSP title for verifying ScreenScraper matching on handheld platforms.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained God of War: Chains of Olympus .iso/.cso image.
